institutionName: North Carolina Agricultural and Technical State University
collegeName: College of Agriculture and Environmental Sciences (CAES)
programName: Bachelor of Science in Laboratory Animal Science
tagline: Precision Care for Research — Advancing Biomedical Discovery
programDescription: The B.S. in Laboratory Animal Science is one of the few undergraduate programs in the nation dedicated to the ethical care and management of research animals. Students gain expertise in laboratory animal husbandry, facility management, regulatory compliance, and biomedical research support. Graduates are in high demand at pharmaceutical companies, university research labs, and federal agencies conducting life-saving biomedical research.

careerOutlook.outlook: Laboratory animal science professionals are critical to biomedical research progress. The field offers exceptional job security with near-100% placement rates for qualified graduates, particularly those from AALAS-accredited programs.
